references.description: Security of processing for resources affected by missing authorization when personal data is exposed.
references.condition: The affected system processes personal data as defined by GDPR Art. 4

references.description: ICT risk management controls for missing authorization in financial entity infrastructure.
references.condition: The affected system is part of the ICT infrastructure of a financial entity subject to DORA

references.description: Access control policies and asset management for essential or important entities.
references.condition: The entity is an essential or important entity subject to NIS2
